title: Summing n numbers uses n-1 additions
statement_informal: Adding the n numbers in a list takes exactly n-1 additions (fold the tail into the head).

cost_model.notes: One addition per element folded into the accumulator; the head seeds it, so the count is length - 1.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 1/2 — basic operation counts; combining n values needs n-1 binary operations.
